content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving away, and the car appears to be on the inside of the curve, slightly left of center but on track.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 31 + 5 = 36
Waypoint 36: (7.114001989364624, 2.2871004343032837)
Car position: (7.075121750079798, 1.569821987096135)
Bearing = atan2(2.2871 - 1.5698, 7.1140 - 7.0751) = atan2(0.7173, 0.0389) = atan2(18.44) ≈ 86.8°
Current heading: 70.495°
Delta = 86.8 - 70.495 = 16.3° → moderate left turn needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply left ahead, delta +16.3° to waypoint 36 confirms continued left curve, applying 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the arc smoothly.",

    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is slightly left of center (~0.19m) but all wheels on track — acceptable on inside of curve",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-25° entering/maintaining curve at speed 1.5",
    "After the left curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves",
    "Curve sharpens at wp30-38 (y increases from 1.4 to 2.5), monitor delta closely",
    "Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~70° confirming we are deep in the left curve",
    "Delta ~16° at wp36 confirms moderate left curve — maintain 15° left steering",
    "Heading increasing steadily each step (~4-8°/step) — curve is consistent and predictable"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [7.0046, 7.0363, 7.0564, 7.0751],
    "y": [1.2813, 1.3695, 1.4431, 1.5698],
    "yaw": [52.699, 58.137, 62.787, 70.495]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 16.3,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
